3102740.name: Signs Of Life
3102740.description:
Signs of Life is a non-linear, surreal story driven adventure game.

You are thrown into a bizarre scenario: a small woman with a mask is asking for your help to investigate a disembodied head she found in the backyard's hedge maze. Who is friend, who is foe, and how did we end up here? Play to find out.

Features

Non-linear story driven adventure game.
Unique hand drawn 2D Art-Style and 2D animation with customizable character.
Explore and click around to solve puzzles, play mini-games, and find objects including:
  • Journal entries
  • Books
  • Objects to complete quests
  • Slide puzzle
  • Rhythm game
Interactive objects to discover along your journey, such as singing flowers and a moon that talks back.
Original Soundtrack by Caleb Jordahl.
